where.if: AND (content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT id, type AS questionType, difficulty, subject_id AS subjectId, knowledge_point_id AS knowledgePointId, content, options, answer, explanation AS analysis, source, year AS examYear, use_count AS useCount, correct_count AS correctCount, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt FROM questions
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{dto.offset}, #{dto.limit}

SELECT id, type AS questionType, difficulty, subject_id AS subjectId, knowledge_point_id AS knowledgePointId, content, options, answer, explanation AS analysis, source, year AS examYear, use_count AS useCount, correct_count AS correctCount, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt FROM questions WHERE is_active = 1 AND subject_id = #{subjectId} AND type = #{questionType} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questions (type, difficulty, subject_id, knowledge_point_id, content, answer, explanation, source, year, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{question.questionType}, #{question.difficulty}, #{question.subjectId}, #{question.knowledgePointId}, #{question.content}, #{question.answer}, #{question.analysis}, #{question.source}, #{question.examYear}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
